title: Climate-informed EV charging network rollout
summary: A charging operator used C3S thermal data to set site-specific thermal specifications for hundreds of fast-charging sites.
challenge: Planning hundreds of fast-charging sites, the operator needed to account for thermal stress — cold reducing battery acceptance, heat derating charger electronics and cables — in siting and specification.
approach: C3S historical percentiles and projections generated a thermal-stress index per site, capturing cold-season demand spikes and heat-related derating days. High-stress sites received upgraded thermal-management specifications.
results: A significant share of sites were reclassified to a higher thermal tier. The upfront cost uplift was projected to be more than offset by reduced warranty claims and outage days over the asset life.
